Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x47B8 "PEDRO-47B8" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pedro.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Patched the LDY #$80 instruction at $68FA to be LDY #$40 to significantly reduce the wait on the Imagine splash screen.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
